entry.title: Re: The Extensibility Wizard: One Tool to Rule Them All?
entry.content: See Devtoberfest session about the extensibility wizard by @Sesh_Sreenivas and @Karthik-Thiru.

entry.title: Re: [[Contact Experts]] Can I chat with someone on Venmo?
entry.content: No, Venmo doesn’t have a dedicated chat feature. You can leave notes on transactions to explain or communicate about payments, but if you want to have a full conversation, you’ll need to use a different messaging app. C4Yourself

entry.title: Re: aATP ABC set-up not confirming orders
entry.content: Hi Shilpa, the last screenshot shows that ABC is not executed, which makes sense as you have removed material (or generally speaking: set it up to not find any alternative control access anymore). From the red bubble in the RACR one can see that ABC is executed but no material/plants have been checked. If there would have been a check of material/plant, then those insights would be visible in RACR (between red and gray bubble). You mentioned that you maintained Substn. Strgy with 'All possible plants'. This lead to a determination of all plants where the material is maintained (limited to the sames sales org. as the original requested plant). From that perspective you should at least get the material/plant that you find also in your second screenshot (4500070/1104). I am not sure on which S/4HANA release you are, but there is with 2023 FPS 2 the possibility to activate a logging to find more details. Otherwise, I recommend to open an incident to address it. Would be happy if you can share the solution 🙂

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content: Excellent initiative, @David_Chaviano! This program offers a fantastic opportunity for newcomers to develop their skills, grow professionally, and excel in the SAP ecosystem. It provides a solid foundation for those looking to deepen their understanding and make a meaningful impact in the industry.

entry.title: Transport of Migration Project from one environment to another environment.
entry.content:
How to transfert/transport Migration Project from Dev to Quality System? 



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Transport of Migration Project from one environment t...
entry.content:
To transport the Migration Project from One system to another, you can use the Migration Object Modeler (transaction LTMOM) to add the relevant content to a transport request.

Refer to the Help document for more details.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

I am writing to express my interest in participating in the digital skills initiative by SAP Learning.

My name is Ruslan Fanian, and I am from Ukraine. I have a military background, and after my service, I transitioned to the IT sector. Over the past year, I have been working with SAP, leveraging my extensive IT background to adapt and grow within this field.

I believe I am a good fit for this program for several reasons. As a military veteran, I bring a unique perspective and disciplined approach to learning and problem-solving. Additionally, I am highly motivated to enhance my skills further and obtain an SAP certification, which will significantly contribute to my professional growth and open new opportunities within the SAP ecosystem.

The support provided by the digital skills initiative would be invaluable to me, especially considering the financial challenges and the competitive nature of the tech industry. This certification will not only unify my current knowledge but also enable me to contribute more effectively to my organization and community.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to participate in this initiative and am excited about the possibilities it will unlock for my career.

Best regards,
Ruslan

entry.title: Re: Chart data label auto change color disabled in design...
entry.content: Hi Jason, sry for the late answer. I now also tried to create a new design theme to see if the reset button appears. However that did not help. It is still missing. I think the only solution is to start a new theme from scratch and to not change the color of the data labels. That is really unfortunate and disappointing.

entry.title: Can I chat with someone on Venmo? ((Live chat and call ))
entry.content: Yes, you can! Venmo allows users to send messages along with their {{+1(866)-481-8205}} making it easy to communicate with the recipient. summary. Yes, there is a chat feature on Venmo {{+1(866)-481-8205}} that allows users to communicate with each other.

entry.title: Re: How to Handle "Allocation failed; Reason: booked memo...
entry.content: To address the memory performance issue, I applied several optimizations based on the points mentioned. These included adjusting system configurations and optimizing SQL queries, which helped improve efficiency and reduce memory load. Despite these improvements, the solution was still not fully adequate for the system's demands. After thorough analysis, I concluded that upgrading to a SAP instance with higher memory capacity was the most practical and effective option for ensuring stable performance under high loads.

entry.title: Re: What is the name of the table?What is the purpose of...
entry.content:
HI. 

 

Unfortunately, I have a limited exposure to transaction code or report names. However, as far as I understand, it is a dynamic list report with the list of changes implemented to certain objects.

Best regards. 

 

Tetiana

entry.title: How Can I Speak to a Lufthansa Airlines Representative Fast?
entry.content:
To speak to a Lufthansa Airlines representative quickly, call +1 (877) 671 0138. This will connect you directly to a live agent for immediate assistance. You can also use their website’s “Contact Us” page or mobile app to request a callback. Calling +1 (877) 671 0138 ensures that you speak with a representative right away for urgent inquiries.

How to Book Lufthansa Airlines Flight?

You can book a Lufthansa Airlines flight easily by calling +1 (877) 671 0138 to speak to a representative. The live agent will assist you with choosing flights, seat selection, and any special requests. Alternatively, you can book online via the Lufthansa website. For personalized help, call +1 (877) 671 0138 and let the representative guide you through the process.

entry.title: Re: How to Provision a SAP Datasphere Free-Tier Instance
entry.content:
Dear Community

We started in 2018 with SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public Edition), we are using some BTP subscription in the Neo environment. In addition, we have 2 Cloud Foundry subaccounts (EU10 Frankfurt) with some subscriptions (eg. Event Mesh). 

While searching in the entitlements on the CF subaccounts, we cloud not find any SAP Datasphere entry!

Are there any settings or limitations we need to expand or activate?

Thanks for helping
Best Regards
Bruno

entry.title: Re: You ask, we answer - Ask Me Anything Session (Oct 24)
entry.content: I would like to easily call OData function/actions syncronously from SAP Build Apps, but it looks like it is not possible at the moment (e.g. I can bind OData services in "Data/Integrations/SAP systems" section, but function/actions are just not shown). Is it right? Do you have any suggestions to accomplish this task?

entry.title: Can I chat with someone on Venmo? Complete~Guide~Here
entry.content: Venmo does not offer a built-in chat feature for general conversations, but users can Call +1(866)-481-8205 include messages when sending or requesting money. Call +1(866)-481-8205 Venmo for help. These notes are attached to the transaction and can be viewed by both parties.

entry.title: Re: Assign Activities to Text Identifier visible in RF
entry.content: Actually it is possibly in standard SAP. They will be shown as every message in RF and the details can be show via the F9 key.

entry.title: volaris Teléfono 24x7//¿Cómo llamar a Volaris Airlines en México? {{apoyo}}
entry.content:
Para hablar con una persona en Ｖｏｌａｒｉｓ Ａｉｒｌｉｎｅｓ, marca el número de atención al cliente ＋１－８８８－８２９－１４９２ （ＥＥ．ＵＵ．） （ＭＸ） ｏ ＋１－８８８－８２９－１４９５ （ＵＳ）

Sí, avianca ofrece la opción de chatear con su servicio de atención al cliente. A través de su sitio web, puedes acceder a la función de chat en vivo para resolver dudas rápidas. Sin embargo, si prefieres hablar directamente con un representante, puedes marcar el ＋１－８８８－８２９－１４９２ （ＥＥ．ＵＵ．） （ＭＸ） ｏ ＋１－８８８－８２９－１４９５ （ＵＳ） para una atención más personalizada.

entry.title: Storage bin determination for synchronous goods receipts
entry.content:
Hi there,
I am currently unsuccessfully trying to influence the process for synchronous goods receipts for purchase orders so that the goods receipt does not take place on the "GR-AREA" as automatically suggested, but on a different storage bin.

What is the logic here? Which settings / configurations does the storage bin determined in this process?

entry.title: Re: Urgent Issue : Transport API Management with TMS to d...
entry.content:
@gos could u pls confirm the following -

  1. Confirm if you have the space developer roles assigned for Cloud Foundry Org and Space.
  2. Can you verify if you have onboarded SAP APIM inside integration suite trial?

If still you are unable to create a service instance of API Management, then kindly create a ticket on component OPU-API-OD-DT. The team will assist you.

entry.title: Re: Difference and impacts of using Master of Services instead of DIEN Material Type
entry.content: Hi Julio, the main difference between DIEN and SERV is that different views ("User department") are active per default, and that there are Service-specific fields in SERV for Sales - General/Plant regarding Service Profiles. Please review which fields and overall data you need for your processes and then decide on which material type to use.

Hello Community,

I have requirement where I need to export internal table data from one BADI and import that data in 2nd BADI implementation. 
I tried below code, Its working if I write both code (Import & Export) in same BADI(which will make no sense), but not working for 2 different BADI. 

How to achieve this in Public cloud.?
Thank you in advance!!

entry.title: Condition contract settlement: Currency conversion local currency document currency
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

for the "old" SD bonus rebate agreements there was a function to change the currency, in which the accruals were reversed:

1272817 - Final settl.: Accruals reversal in rebate arrangement crcy

Is there something similar for the "new" condition contract / settlement management in S4 ?

Problem:

Accruals are build during invoice creation with accrual conditions assigned to each relevant invoice. In all situations, where we are using invoice currency not equals to local currency of our legal entity, the system converts the accruals by using convertion rate which is relevant to single document.

This leads to the situation that after final settlement, where the accrual clearance is handled with the conversion rate of the final settlement date, we still have leftovers in our accuals.

Any way how to solve this more elegant or to overcome this issue by reversing accruals always in local currency ? Instead of doing manual FI clearing posting at the end of the year ?

Thanks and best regards

Manuel

entry.title: Re: Centralized Storage for Error message - SAC Scripting
entry.content:
Maybe you can store those validation/error texts in a function part of a Composite object, for re-use across stories. Or perhaps in a dedicated model or public dimension for re-use.
But there's nothing natively for this in the SAC product.

entry.title: Re: Collective order - goods movement error
entry.content: Resolution Due to the collective order processing the system creates a material document for both the goods receipt of the lower-level order as well as for the goods issue of the higher-level. If the storage location is WM-managed a posting in the WM is absolutely necessary. It is necessary to ensure that both the Goods Receipt (GR) and the Goods Issue (GI) posting occur onto the same WM coordinates so that the quants cancel themselves out. Therefore, for such a scenario, it is not recommended to use dynamic coordinates because the storage bin would always correspond to the order number and the bin would always be different. As a consequence, it is recommended to enter the same fixed storage bin for both the GR and for the GI in the Customizing of the WM movement types: SPRO (IMG) > Logistics Execution > Warehouse Management > Activities > Transfers > Define Movement types

entry.title: Re: Collective order - goods movement error
entry.content: SAP Note 2760220 - Negative stock remaining after confirmation of collective order

entry.title: Re: goods movement error - collective order
entry.content:
2760220 - Negative stock remaining after confirmation of collective order

Resolution

Due to the collective order processing the system creates a material document for both the goods receipt of the lower-level order as well as for the goods issue of the higher-level. If the storage location is WM-managed a posting in the WM is absolutely necessary.

  1. It is necessary to ensure that both the Goods Receipt (GR) and the Goods Issue (GI) posting occur onto the same WM coordinates so that the quants cancel themselves out.
  2. Therefore, for such a scenario, it is not recommended to use dynamic coordinates because the storage bin would always correspond to the order number and the bin would always be different.
  3. As a consequence, it is recommended to enter the same fixed storage bin for both the GR and for the GI in the Customizing of the WM movement types: 
    SPRO (IMG) > Logistics Execution > Warehouse Management > Activities > Transfers > Define Movement types

entry.title: Re: I've just downloaded logon , how can i access a syste...
entry.content:
Hello, You may not be able to logon to SAP client if you do not have server access. Downloading logon pad will help only if you have server access. It is granted either to SAP customers or to SAP Partners. I would recommend you search for one of such partner/vendor who provide server access. Such vendor have access to SAP servers and they create a user for you, which you can use to login into a client. 

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Storage bin determination for synchronous goods receipts
entry.content:
Hi Matthias 

As I understood your question that you asking for storage bin GR-Area for that you will get your answer from below both blog. I have given you question also answer for interim storage bin determination

Q- How does system know that after posting GR to GR-ZONE, it has to also create a put away WT?

This is controlled based on your storage type and WPT settings. in Storage type customizing, you need to mention that system has to create a put away WT if GR is posted to a bin of this storage type. This would be normally setup for goods receiving area 9010 and 9015 for example if we need to work with synchronous goods receipt process.

https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blogs-by-members/synchronous-goods-receipt-for-purchase-orders-in-s4-hana-2020-embedded-ewm/ba-p/13524023

https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blogs-by-members/synchronous-goods-receipts-in-ewm-for-external-procurement-po-based-with/ba-p/13515822

 

Regards

Rashid Khan

Kindly let me know if you have different thoughts.

entry.title: how to add an attribute of a different type in advanced-search in backoffice?
entry.content:
Is it possible that in backoffice to add a new field in the customerReview advanced-search, to search for customer reviews by the product code, ootb i can search by the product itself: 

<context merge-by="type" parent="GenericItem" type="CustomerReview" component="advanced-search">
   <advanced-search:advanced-search xmlns:advancedsearch="http://www.hybris.com/cockpitng/config/advancedsearch">
        <advanced-search:field-list>
<advanced-search:field xmlns="http://www.hybris.com/cockpitng/config/advancedsearch" name="product" selected="true"/>
</advanced-search:field-list>
 </advanced-search:advanced-search>
    </context>

 I tried this but it didn't work: 

<context merge-by="type" type="CustomerReview" component="advanced-search">
    <advanced-search:advanced-search>
        <advanced-search:field-list>
            <advanced-search:field name="product.code" selected="true"/>
</advanced-search:field-list>
   </advanced-search:advanced-search>
</context>

entry.title: Re: Footnote in adobe form
entry.content: My assumption is, you are using <sup> tag inside the rich text to display these super scripts shown in the text. In this case, one bruteforce approach is to read objects present in each page and look for <sup> tag. If you find any, then display those foot notes. BTW, what type of form is this? print form or an interactive?

entry.title: Restrict/Approval for production changes using transport bundle
entry.content:
Since transport bundle has been added and it is being widely used to transport the changes from test environments to the productions system. Can we add a functionality to approve/reject change request using transport bundle for some users? If not then does anyone think that we can benefit from it? I would go forward and raise a product improvement request.

For eg: If an intern tried to push a change via transport bundle to production, the global admin or some other high authority user needs to approve it to for success transfer of the configuration/report etc.

entry.title: How to config SAP ECC to SF EC Mashup for Payroll infotypes
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I am currently working at a client to configure Mashup screens of custom Payroll infotypes in SF EC from SAP ECC. 

I have seen few articles that this is achievable, usually for displaying payslip it is done. 

Can any one pls share the config steps of any other blog with its details. 

Also I need to know that this Mashup functionality is only for display in SF EC or data can be updated and replicated back to SAP HCM infotypes from SF EC

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano,
I hope you are doing well, I'm Amira Zahran, a SAP SD Consultant from Egypt, and I want to advance my career by becoming a certified SAP Sales &Distribution. I appreciate your kindness in providing me with a voucher.
Thanks,
Best Regards

entry.title: How to reach out to SAP Education - Learning Hub team for support
entry.content:
Are you looking to get support from the Learning Hub/Training Team, and you do not know where to start? Then this blog is for you… 

Here I will share the steps that you need to follow to engage with the SAP Learning Support Center; the Support agents are available 24 hours per day, Monday to Friday and most queries are responded to within 24 hours. 

In the support platform you can also find FAQs related to: 

  • General Support Topics 
  • Practice Systems 
  • Training Reseller Partner Topics 
  • Learning and Certification Advise  
  • Course Booking and Payment  
  • And Analytics Dashboard 

How to create a case 

If you find that the information that you are looking for is not in the support platform, then you can create a case to get support on your specific query.  

All you need to do is to login with your Universal ID and create a ticket. 

From the SAP Learning Hub site: 

  1. You need to click on the question mark (?) icon found on the upper right side of the page. 
  2. In the Help Center page click on the 'Contact Us' button and choose 'Request Technical Assistance'. 
  3. Click on "Need More Help" 
  4. Login with your Universal ID and you then need to click on "Create Case" 

From the SAP Learning site: 

  1. Scroll down to the bottom of the page and click on 'Get Support' found under Support and Contact. 
  2. You will be directed to the next page, the User Support Center page, you can find the FAQs for self-help and detailed guides. 
  3. If the needed support is not found in the FAQs, kindly scroll down and click on the 'Need Help' icon and you will be directed to the next page to raise a ticket. 
  4. Click on the 'Create Case' button. 

 

Additionally, you can use the direct link to User Support Center. 

To view your ticket update: Please click on the refresh button before to find your case/ticket update. 

What can Support Agents assist you with? 

The Learning Team can assist you if you want to get information about course, certification content and learning journeys also they can advise you to understand what learning is needed to achieve your aims. 

Other services include:  

  • 1st Level questions on certification, including advice on correct UID set up and how you can access to your badges.  
  • Issues related to information, delivery, and after-care service of Instructor-Led classrooms. 
  • Bookings and billing related issues are usually handled by other internal team, but the Learning team can get involved to give approval for any free of charge re-bookings and similar scenarios as these are often related to customer complaints etc. 
  • Visa letters. 
  • Providing supplier vendor information on request. 

Request support in a different language. 

If you want the Learning team to assist you in your preferred language, you can select the language once you have added the description, you will need to pick the Country you are located and select from: German, English, Spanish, French and Japanese. 

We would also like to share this blog so you can learn more about SAP Certifications and UID...all you need to know! 

Thank you for reading!

entry.title: Re: Why db hints doesn't work?

Statement 'Explain' is not defined.

entry.title: Export Custom Field "Amount with Currency"
entry.content:
Hi Community,

when I export a custom field of type "Amount with Currency" (i create a target group and export via export definition) the Amount with Currency comes out in the format 10.70€ for 10,70€. In Excel it then becomes "Oct 70" and when I convert it to a number it becomes “25842” which is obviously not equal to 10,70€.

You can adjust the decimal format in the general settings, but this has no effect on the export.

Does anyone have a workaround?

Kind Regards

Katharina

entry.title: Re: Dashboard develop into SAP Business One SQL
entry.content:
As suggested, highly recommended to use the web client. Everything you need to know is available here: 

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/exploring-sap-business-one-web-client 

Good luck,

Maya

Best Regards

Jenny

Kamal

entry.title: Re: Seeking Advice on Custom Authentication for CAPM Serv...
entry.content: Hi Rahul, Security is embedded in the CAP framework. Running 'cds add xsuaa' will do the trick. To read more about it, I suggest the CAP documentation here: https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/security/

entry.title: Proposal to keep spammers away
entry.content:
I have spotted an influx of spam posts in SAP Community. They are still ongoing. The current countermeasures, e.g. moderators notifications, work, but they don't work fast or efficiently enough. 

I had a similar problem on Polish SAP Bulletin Board that I manage. I have introduced a simple rule that effectively resolved spam issues:

  • the first 5 posts of a newly registered user have to be manually approved by a moderator
  • if a new user posts a spam, the user is immediately deleted and their email put on a blacklist

This approach is very straightforward but it works. Five posts is enough to see if a user is legitimate and if their posts are of value. Spammers won't go to lengths of creating five goods posts, before posting their junk.

Why don't we implement a similar procedure for SAP Community?

@craigcmehil  @jerryjanda @Sandra_Rossi @KatherineKenneally

entry.title: Cannot install Booster - SAP Integration Suite application is not subscribed.
entry.content:
Hi,

I am currently following the SAP Learning Hub Integration Suite course. I also tried to play with the integration suite and afterwards I deleted my trial account and created a new one, subscribed to the Integration Suite, and assigned the necessary roles to the user. However, when I try to install the integration suite Booster, I encounter the following error: "SAP Integration Suite application is not subscribed. Please subscribe to the application and activate capabilities manually to proceed."

 

Despite the application being subscribed to my trial account, I am still facing this issue.

 

 

 

Could someone please assist me with resolving this?

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 3 Contest Activities
entry.content:
I have the same problem with #BFAB9F

Thank you

entry.title: Re: CL_SALV_TABLE number of rows
entry.content:
Unfortunately I need this program to work in ABAP 7.00, but I got rid of 'IF' and some variables, so the final versions seems to be like this:

METHOD after_salv_function.

DATA: lo_grid             TYPE REF TO cl_gui_alv_grid,
	  lo_display          TYPE REF TO cl_salv_display_settings,
	  lt_filtered_entries TYPE        lvc_t_fidx,
	  lv_total            TYPE        char10,
	  lv_filtered         TYPE        char10,
	  lv_title            TYPE        lvc_title.

CALL FUNCTION 'GET_GLOBALS_FROM_SLVC_FULLSCR'
  IMPORTING
	e_grid = lo_grid.

lo_grid->get_filtered_entries( IMPORTING et_filtered_entries = lt_filtered_entries ).

DESCRIBE TABLE gt_tr_list          LINES lv_total.
DESCRIBE TABLE lt_filtered_entries LINES lv_filtered.

lv_filtered = lv_total - lv_filtered.

CONCATENATE lv_filtered 'records selected out of' lv_total 'total'INTO lv_title SEPARATED BY space.
CONDENSE lv_title.

lo_display = go_table->get_display_settings( ).
lo_display->set_list_header( lv_title ).

ENDMETHOD.

Thanks again!

entry.title: Re: Purge External Users in 360 Reviews
entry.content:
Hi Sofi,

You can do it from both 'Purge Inactive User' and 'DRTM 360 Reviews - External User Purge' from the purge request in data retention management.

When you are using the first option, select a single/multiple users. Give criteria for multiple users like inactive time, hire date, country/region, department, division, location, job code etc. You can also upload a list of users by their user ID/Assignment ID. After this in the 'Exclude users that meet the following criteria:', select 'Users are process owners of at least one in-progress 360 Review form'. Then launch/schedule the purge.

When using the second option, you have more control on the criteria of purge pertaining to 360 Review. In the purge rule, you can define the criteria. There are 4 scenarios given for the external users. To purge data of users having multiple forms, each of the forms must meet one of the criteria here.

  1. Number of days since users declined a 360 Review form.
  2. Number of days since users submitted a 360 Review form.
  3. Number of days having elapsed without a response from users to a 360 Review form.
  4. Number of days since users who've never been involved in any 360 Review form were added to the system.

 

See the requirement and choose the option. If many users have become inactive or have not given any response to a 360 review evaluation process, you can use the second option. If it is pertaining to a single user who has left the organization, then first option is good.

 

Let me know if it helps.

Also, if the answer serves the purpose, mark is as solution.

Thanks for reading. 🙂

entry.title: Re: Field ISDfCSTEx in ADM1: where is it managed?
entry.content: Thank you!!It's exactly what was causing the problema and I've solved it.

entry.title: Re: SAP Slipstream Engine: Keyboard opens automatically i...
entry.content: Yes, this is probably far too complex for all screens. You need a global solution directly from the application. Strangely enough, it works smoothly with the old ITSmobile service, which I find very unsatisfactory.

entry.title: [volaris Teléfono]¿Cómo llamar a Volaris Airlines en México?
entry.content:
Para hablar con una persona en Ｖｏｌａｒｉｓ Ａｉｒｌｉｎｅｓ, marca el número de atención al cliente +𝟙 𝟠𝟠𝟠-𝟠⊘𝟙Ϭ-7Ƽ6​ （ＥＥ．ＵＵ．） （ＭＸ） ｏ ⁺⁵²⁻⁸⁰⁻⁰⁴⁶¹⁻⁰⁴⁶¹ (USA)（ＵＳ）

Sí, avianca ofrece la opción de chatear con su servicio de atención al cliente. A través de su sitio web, puedes acceder a la función de chat en vivo para resolver dudas rápidas. Sin embargo, si prefieres hablar directamente con un representante, puedes marcar el ⁺⁵²⁻⁸⁰⁻⁰⁴⁶¹⁻⁰⁴⁶¹ （ＥＥ．ＵＵ．） （ＭＸ） ｏ +𝟙 𝟠𝟠𝟠-𝟠⊘𝟙Ϭ-7Ƽ6​ (USA) ＵＳ） para una atención más personalizada.

entry.title: Re: Simplifying HTML5 Content Consumption Across Subaccounts
entry.content:
Hi @rupambhatta 

How to federate content from a subscribed application(Fiori Apps), These Fiori apps are based on MTA solution running in SAP BTP ABAP Environment.

Provider Subaccount: MTA SaaS solution running in SAP BTP ABAP Environment 

Subscriber subaccount: subscriber of SaaS solution (Fiori Apps/ABAP Launchpad)

Now we are looking on how to federate Fiori apps from subscribed sub account, can you suggest?

Thanks

Sreeni

entry.title: Re: Firebase and last 4.12.107 Runtime Issues
entry.content: Facing same problem. Tried on Android versions 12 and 13. Same issue with the older versions as well.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano ,

I am reaching out to seek support for the Digital Skills Initiative, which aims to empower those who are underrepresented in the technology industry. As someone from a remote part of Kenya, I face financial barriers in pursuing SAP certification, a vital step for advancing my career in our local manufacturing sector.

I am eager to deepen my knowledge of SAP and am fully committed to the rigorous study required for certification. If you have any guidance, resources, or support to help me access this opportunity, I would greatly appreciate it! 

Thank you 🙂

entry.title: Re: Downloading the PL
entry.content:
Hello,

You can do this using the app: Balance Sheet/Income Statement - Multidimensional. After generating the statements you can export it in the excel. 

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Supplier Invoice S4 HANA Public cloud - CDS view for...
entry.content:
Hello,

Well it is a common feature to sum up the values for the same keys. You can deal this at the CDS association level. The custom CDS (after association) should return as many lines as required in the report. If your custom CDS gives the right result it will render the right values in the report too. 

Thank you!

entry.title: Desktop shortcut of CS02 with inserted BOM number
entry.content:
Hello,

for direct open CS02 transaction is created shortcut and this is working (screenshot of shortcut attached).

How to create shortcut for not only open CS02 transaction, but fulfil and open one more screen - example of request for full shortcut functionality from win desktop shortcut:

1. Open transaction CS02
2. Insert follow data:

Material: 980640645
Plant: empty field
BOM usage: 3
Alternative BOM: empty field

 

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Urgent Issue : Transport API Management with TMS to d...

entry.title: Re: Proposal to keep spammers away
entry.content:
Hi @DominikTylczyn,
We apologise for the spam posts in the community, but as you have noticed we have been under a spam attack. We have the attack under control now, and are working as fast as we can to remove the spam content.

entry.title: Re: Proposal to keep spammers away
entry.content:
Good suggestion.

Should be implemented.

entry.title: Re: Proposal to keep spammers away

entry.title: Warning Message for nearby expiry material while creating Sales Order
entry.content:
Greetings Everyone,

Client requirement is the implementation of a warning message in the system. 

This message would alert users when creating sale orders for materials approaching a 9-month expiry period.

Please let me know and thanks in advance!

SAP ERP

entry.title: How to consume BPA destination in the Fiori template in BAS?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created a Build Process and after deployment i created a BPA destination using all the necessary additional properties in BTP Cockpit .

When UI guy is trying to add service this destination is not appearing in the list . Just want to understand is it possible to directly consume BPA instance in BAS or not? If yes then please guide on this.

Kindly share your inputs.

Thanks!

entry.title: ¿𝗖ó𝗺𝗼 𝗹𝗹𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗿 𝗮 𝗔𝗶𝗿 𝗙𝗿𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝗱𝗲𝘀𝗱𝗲 𝗠é𝘅𝗶𝗰𝗼?{𝗔𝗶𝗿 𝗳𝗿𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝗠𝗮𝘅ico}
entry.content: ​🇵​​🇦​​🇷​​🇦​ ​🇱​​🇱​​🇦​​🇲​​🇦​​🇷​ ​🇦​ ​🇦​​🇮​​🇷​ ​🇫​​🇷​​🇦​​🇳​​🇨​​🇪​ ​🇩​​🇪​​🇸​​🇩​​🇪​ ​🇲​é​🇽​​🇮​​🇨​​🇴​⦂ +5️⃣2️⃣ 8️⃣0️⃣0️⃣ 3️⃣5️⃣1️⃣1️⃣ 0️⃣1️⃣2️⃣(​🇲​é​🇽​​🇮​​🇨​​🇴​ ​🇴​​🇹​​🇦​) ​🇴​ +1️⃣ 8️⃣8️⃣8️⃣ 8️⃣0️⃣1️⃣6️⃣-7️⃣5️⃣6️⃣ (​🇺​​🇸​)(​🇺​​🇸​​🇦​)), ​🇵​​🇺​​🇪​​🇩​​🇪​​🇸​ ​🇸​​🇪​​🇬​​🇺​​🇮​​🇷​ ​🇪​​🇸​​🇹​​🇴​​🇸​ ​🇵​​🇦​​🇸​​🇴​​🇸​⦂ ​🇳​ú​🇲​​🇪​​🇷​​🇴​ ​🇩​​🇪​ ​🇹​​🇪​​🇱​é​🇫​​🇴​​🇳​​🇴​⦂ ​🇲​​🇦​​🇷​​🇨​​🇦​ ​🇪​​🇱​ ​🇳​ú​🇲​​🇪​​🇷​​🇴​ ​🇩​​🇪​ ​🇦​​🇹​​🇪​​🇳​​🇨​​🇮​ó​🇳​ ​🇦​​🇱​ ​🇨​​🇱​​🇮​​🇪​​🇳​​🇹​​🇪​ ​🇩​​🇪​ ​🇦​​🇮​​🇷​ ​🇫​​🇷​​🇦​​🇳​​🇨​​🇪​ ​🇪​​🇳​ ​🇲​é​🇽​​🇮​​🇨​​🇴​, ​🇶​​🇺​​🇪​ ​🇪​​🇸​ ​🇪​​🇱​ +5️⃣2️⃣ 8️⃣0️⃣0️⃣ 3️⃣5️⃣1️⃣1️⃣ 0️⃣1️⃣2️⃣(​🇲​é​🇽​​🇮​​🇨​​🇴​ ​🇴​​🇹​​🇦​) ​🇴​ +1️⃣ 8️⃣8️⃣8️⃣ 8️⃣0️⃣1️⃣6️⃣-7️⃣5️⃣6️⃣ (​🇺​​🇸​)(​🇺​​🇸​​🇦​).
